Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jonathan Rizzardi, Esq. of LEWIS BRISBOIS 415/362-2580, appearing for defendant / moving party

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant J. Patrick O'Neill's and Hancock Properties, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, And For Monetary Sanctions. 1. Motion of defendants J. Patrick O'Neill and Hancock Properties, Inc. to compel discovery responses granted; defendant Rossi shall serve full, complete and verified responses within seven days of the date of the court's order; all objections waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted in the sum of $350.00.
COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Defendant Gary Rossi To Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Ddocuments And Tangible Things Described In Deposition Notice And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Gary Rossy
Off Calendar Feb-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Gary Goodman's motion to compel defendant Rossi to produce documents and testify at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to appear at the time and place designated by plaintiff pursuant to proper notice. The deposition shall be completed within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,620 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
